text:
There once was a boy named Oliver. Oliver loved collecting stickers. Every day after school, he’d collect shiny new stickers from his friends and classmates.

Oliver had several special collections. He had animal stickers, sport stickers, flower stickers... you name it! His room was a maze of stickers, each corner revealing a new prize.

One day, Oliver went to bed dreaming of a rare puzzle sticker, something that wasn’t in his collection at all. In his dream, he had discovered a secret world hidden among ancient artifacts. Each artifact held a different kind of sticker. He learned things about history that he didn’t know.

When he woke up, the first thing he did was look at his own collection. But it felt empty without his rare puzzle sticker. He decided to search his attic.

His hands brushed against something cool and hard. It was a puzzle! He worked tirelessly, putting it together and verifying each piece. When it was done, his dream came into bright focus!
